plugins.name: gemdex
plugins.description: Semantic code search via Gemini embeddings + embedded LanceDB + MCP. Bundles the gemdex MCP server, a PostToolUse hook that auto-reindexes after edits, and a skill that nudges Claude to prefer semantic search over Grep/Glob for intent-based queries. No Docker required.

plugins.name: gemdex-droid
plugins.description: Droid-native build of Gemdex. Same MCP server + skill as the Claude plugin, but the PostToolUse auto-reindex hook uses Droid's single-`command` shape with `${DROID_PLUGIN_ROOT}` so it actually executes under `droid` (the Claude variant silently drops `args[]`). Install this one if you're on Factory Droid.
